sectors.closed_layers: G1-G6 export gate; same-input transport route; row/covariance admission candidate
sectors.boundary_or_next_gate: EW covariance/finalization review; DIZET row protocol publication hardening
sectors.must_not_claim: physical-final W closure; zero residual; all EW observables final

sectors.codomain: pole QED with full-running ledger boundary
sectors.route_family: QED pole plus external running ledger
sectors.closed_layers: source vector; residual operator; coefficients; scalar normalization; CODATA ledger; pole envelope; LO QED witness; full-running boundary
sectors.boundary_or_next_gate: full multi-loop QED coefficient/threshold/matching/covariance ledger required for running-final
sectors.may_claim: charged-lepton pole-codomain APF completion under envelope and external-ledger boundary
sectors.must_not_claim: QED-running final; physical-final; exact equality; residual-free fit
sectors.recommended_next_version: defer unless external full QED ledger is intentionally imported

sectors.closed_layers: Schur-count normalization; self-scale codomain; same-codomain PDG audit; shared QCD ledger discipline
sectors.must_not_claim: physical-final charm; pole mass; zero residual; full QCD covariance final

sectors.closed_layers: trace anchor; self-scale codomain; same-codomain PDG audit; shared QCD ledger discipline
sectors.must_not_claim: physical-final bottom; pole mass; zero residual; full QCD covariance final

sectors.closed_layers: native APF MSR scale selector; codomain admission; shared heavy-QCD ledger discipline
sectors.boundary_or_next_gate: MSR-to-pole/MC/MSbar conversion ledger required before direct top comparison
sectors.must_not_claim: top pole mass; MC mass; direct PDG top closure; physical-final top
sectors.recommended_next_version: v57 or dedicated MSR conversion theorem

sectors.codomain: MSbar(2 GeV) light masses through chiral/lattice evaluator
sectors.closed_layers: T_u source; T_d/T_s source; full T_uds; identity knockout; universal scalar knockout; APF-side boundary
sectors.boundary_or_next_gate: external source-independent chiral/lattice evaluator and joint covariance required
sectors.may_claim: light-quark APF source/pretransport completion at chiral-lattice boundary
sectors.must_not_claim: light-quark export candidate; MSbar(2 GeV) numeric prediction; physical-final u,d,s
sectors.recommended_next_version: external chiral/lattice evaluator import only if desired

claim_ladder.meaning: APF trace anchor exists in internal trace scheme
claim_ladder.claim_boundary: internal APF object only; no physical codomain claim
source-side object may feed a route but is not export

claim_ladder.meaning: transport route form typed without target reuse
claim_ladder.claim_boundary: route structure exists; numeric export may still require constants/covariance

claim_ladder.meaning: codomain, route, constants boundary, no-smuggling, and residual channels admitted
pole-codomain branch complete within declared APF envelope
claim_ladder.claim_boundary: pole-level completion; downstream running remains external

claim_ladder.meaning: APF side complete and named external ledger is required
claim_ladder.claim_boundary: do not promote until external evaluator is supplied

claim_ladder.meaning: all transport, covariance, scheme, and residual channels closed
claim_ladder.claim_boundary: not assigned to any sector in v55

route_gates.status: closed for EW/W, top, charged leptons, charm, bottom; boundary-typed for light quarks
typed for all; external full ledgers open for QED running, heavy-QCD final, chiral/lattice
admitted for charged-lepton pole; typed/open for EW and QCD final layers
closed as a required registry invariant
closed/typed for every registry row; final residual closure not claimed
